title: helichrysum heywoodianum
intro: Helichrysum heywoodianum, also known as the Island Everlasting, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of essential oils, including alpha-pinene and limonene. The health benefits of Helichrysum heywoodianum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oil blends, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
